content:
🟡 Cybersecurity company Trellix suffered breach enabling unauthorized access to a portion of its source code.
CVE: 
Target: Trellix source code
According to The Hacker News. #GitLeaks #SourceCodeBreach

🟠 A local privilege escalation flaw (CVE-2026-31431 (CVSS: 7.8/10)) in various Linux distributions allows attackers to gain Linux root access.
CVE: CVE-2026-31431 (CVSS: 7.8/10)
Target: Various Linux distributions
According to The Hacker News. #LinuxLPE #CVEupdate

🟡 Researchers discovered a large-scale scam using Telegram Mini Apps for crypto scams & Android malware distribution.
CVE: None listed
Actor: Not specified
Target: Telegram Mini Apps/Android
According to BleepingComputer. #TelegramMiniApps #AndroidMalware

🟡 Microsoft Defender is detecting legitimate DigiCert root certificates as malware, causing false positives and potential certificate removal.
CVE: None
Actor: None
According to BleepingComputer. #DigiCert #WindowsCert

🟡 ShinyHunters claims a successful data breach against Instructure, allegedly stealing user data. 
According to BleepingComputer. #ShinyHunters #DataBreach

🟡 A global crackdown has led to the arrest of 276 suspects, shutting down 9 cryptocurrency scam centers and seizing $701M from investment fraud schemes targeting Americans. 
According to The Hacker News. #CryptoScam #FinancialFraud

🟢 Data centers are becoming critical infrastructure targets as AI drives dependence on cloud infrastructure.
CVE: 
Target: 
According to CyberScoop. #CloudSecurity #AIInfrastructure

🔴 Progress Software warns of a critical MOVEit Automation auth bypass flaw that can lead to unauthorized access and execution of code.

🚨 Threat: CVE-2023-33149 (CVSS: 7.8/10) 
🎯 Target: Progress Software's MOVEit Automation
⚠️ Simply Put: A hacker can bypass security checks and access sensitive file transfers without a password.

According to BleepingComputer. #CVE202333149 #AuthBypass

🔴 
A 17-year-old in Japan hacked into Kaikatsu Club's database, stealing the personal data of over 7 million users to fund his Pokémon card habit.

🚨 Threat: 
🎯 Target: 
⚠️ Simply Put: A teenager used hacking skills to steal millions of people's personal data for personal gain.

According to The Hacker News. #DataBreach #UnauthorizedAccess

🔴 A China-based group known as Silver Fox has successfully deployed the malware known as ABCDoor via tax-themed phishing campaigns targeting Russian and Indian entities.

🚨 Threat: ABCDoor (no specified threat actor or CVE mentioned)
🎯 Target: Organizations in Russia and India (specifically, entities targeted by tax-themed phishing)
⚠️ Simply Put: Hackers sent fake tax emails to target Russian and Indian companies, infecting them with malware that could be used for cyber attacks.

According to The Hacker News. #CyberAttack #Phishing

🔴 A critical cPanel vulnerability is being exploited by an unknown threat actor to target government and MSP networks.

🚨 Threat: CVE-2023xxxxx
🎯 Target: cPanel, government and MSP networks in Southeast Asia, and the U.S.
⚠️ Simply Put: Hackers are using a recently discovered flaw in a web hosting software to break into government and business networks.

According to The Hacker News. #CyberAttack #cPanel

Cyber attacks rock India & Russia! China-backed APT group delivers ABCDoor & ValleyRAT malware via over 1,600 tax-themed phishing messages. Targeted sectors: unknown.
Technical breakdown: ABCDoor backdoor, ValleyRAT malware delivered via phishing campaigns, targeting various sectors in India and Russia.
At least 1,600 orgs targeted across India and Russia. Unknown number of users/systems affected. Sensitive data and access at risk.
Reported by Dark Reading. Follow for daily threat intelligence. #Cybersecurity #APTAfrica #ThreatIntelligence
Critical bug exploited in Weaver E-cology office automation since March. Hackers using CVE-2026-22679 (CVSS: 9.8/10). via BleepingComputer #WEcologyVulnerability

🔴 ScarCruft group pushes Android malware "BirdCall" via video game platform. North Korea-linked APT37 targets Android users via game supply-chain attack via BleepingComputer #ScarCruft #AndroidMalware
🟡 Google increases Android exploit bounties to $1.5 million for toughest flaws, while reducing payouts for those AI can easily find. via BleepingComputer #AndroidRewards #BugBounty
🔴 FTC bans data broker Kochava from selling Americans’ location data without consent, affecting hundreds of millions of mobile devices via BleepingComputer #dataprivacy
🔴 A student hacked Taiwan's high-speed rail TETRA system, triggering emergency brakes. Multiple trains affected. via BleepingComputer #cybersecurity #railways
🟠 High-severity phishing campaign targets US organizations via fake emails with Microsoft branding. via SecurityWeek #phishingcampaign
🔴 Breach of Trellix source code reveals security product's inner workings, potentially aiding attacks. via Dark Reading
🟠 Critical Linux kernel LPE (CVE-2026-31431 (CVSS: 7.8/10)) allows root access to millions of systems. via Unit 42
Cyber attacks targeting UAE tripled amid war with Iran, threatening critical infrastructure. via Dark Reading #CYBERATTACK #GulfSecurity
😐 No security incident reported. via Kaspersky Securelist #cybersecurity
A Romanian hacker is extradited to the US for a role in a 2009 hacking scheme. He was indicted in 2017.
No notable security incident reported regarding emails via Cisco Talos with #CyberSecurity
🟠 New Mirai-derived botnet, xlabs_v1, targets Android Debug Bridge to hijack IoT devices for DDoS attacks. Hundreds of devices affected via Netherlands-hosted server. via The Hacker News #DDoS #IoT

🟠 A PAN-OS captive portal zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2026-0300 (CVSS: Score Pending)) enables unauthenticated RCE via buffer overflow. PAN-OS is affected via User-ID Auth Portal via buffer overflow. via Unit 42 #cybersecurity

🔴 A dozen critical vulnerabilities in the open-source vm2 Node.js library can be exploited to escape the sandbox and execute arbitrary code, affecting susceptible systems. via The Hacker News #vm2 #Node.js
🔴 A malware family called ZiChatBot spreads via compromised PyPI packages on Windows and Linux, delivering malicious files. via The Hacker News #ZiChatBot #PyPI
🟠 Hackers using shady packages, fake apps, and stolen logins in attack chains via Discord channels. Your login credentials may be vulnerable. via The Hacker News #ThreatsDay2026
🔴 Critical: An AI-powered cyberattack failed to breach OT systems after being thwarted by a SCADA login screen. A new zero-day vulnerability has been exposed. via Dark Reading #OTSecurity
🔴 Hackers use AI to create stealthy emails that can compromise a single laptop. All it takes is a single click to shut down your network. via The Hacker News #CyberSecurity
🔴 🔴 Cyber attackers 'PCPJack' steal sensitive cloud info via parquet files. Multiple cloud environments at risk. via Dark Reading #cloudsecurity
🔴 Ransom demand from cybercrime group threatens to leak data from 275 million students and faculty on Canvas education platform via Krebs on Security #cybersecurity

🔴 Linux 'Dirty Frag' zero-day exploit: local attackers can gain root access on most major distros via unauthenticated RCE. Multiple distros affected via single command via BleepingComputer #Linux #ZeroDay
🟡 A former government contractor was convicted of conspiring to delete dozens of federal databases. He and accomplices affected sensitive gov't data. via BleepingComputer #governmenthacking
🔴 Critical: Braintrust suffered data breach via their AWS account. AI provider secrets compromised. via SecurityWeek #dataprotection
🔴 Quasar Linux RAT (QLNX) steals DevOps credentials for software supply chain compromise via silent implants. Developers across all sectors targeted. via The Hacker News #linuxsecurity
🔴 ShinyHunters claims 9,000 schools affected by Canvas data breach, plans to leak student data via CyberScoop #datasecurity #EDU
🔴 TCLBANKER banking trojan detected on 59 fintech and cryptocurrency platforms using WhatsApp and Outlook worms. Targets Brazilian banks. via The Hacker News #bankingtrocjan
🟠 Critical vulnerabilities patched in cPanel & WHM! 💥 Exploits privilege escalation, code execution, and DoS. Patch ASAP! via The Hacker News #cybersecurity
🟠 Infostealer malware pushed to Windows users via fake OpenAI repository on Hugging Face. Affected: Windows users who downloaded the malicious project. via BleepingComputer #OpenAI #HuggingFace
🔴 Critical: JDownloader site hacked, installers replaced with Python RAT malware via Windows & Linux payloads, via BleepingComputer #cybersecurity

🔴 Ollama has 300K+ servers vulnerable to CVE-2026-7482 (CVSS: 9.1/10) (9.1 CVSS): unauthenticated attackers can leak process memory via out-of-bounds read. via The Hacker News #OllamaVulnerability #CVE20267482
🔴 💔 Critical breach: Police shut down Crimenetwork marketplace relaunch and arrest admin generating over 3.6 million euros via illegal activities. via BleepingComputer #cybersecurity
🟡 Attackers abuse Google Ads & Claude.ai chats to push Mac malware. Mac users searching for Claude download may be affected. via BleepingComputer #mac security
🟡 A medium severity vulnerability was found in YARA-X 1.16.0, no exploit details are given. via SANS ISC #YARA-X

🔴 Critical data breach: A fake @OpenAI Privacy Filter repo has been downloaded over 244K times from @HuggingFace, delivering a Rust-based info stealer to Windows users. via The Hacker News #OpenAI #DataBreaches
🔴 Red Alert! TrickMo Android banking malware adopts TON blockchain for covert comms, targeting users in Europe via phishing campaigns. via BleepingComputer #MobileSecurity
🔴 Critical: Hackers used a flaw in Canvas to deface login portals and leave an extortion message. Multiple Instructure customers affected via BleepingComputer #cybersecurity
˯️ ✃️ 'Dirty Frag' exploit may already be exploited on Enterprise Linux distros via privilege escalation. via Dark Reading #LinuxSecurity
🟠 Critical: Checkmarx Jenkins AST plugin compromised via modified version. Ensure version 2.0.13-829.vc72453fa_1c16, published Dec 17, 2025, is used. via The Hacker News #Checkmarx #Jenkins
🟢 Apple patches 84 vulnerabilities across its operating systems (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, vision OS) via SANS ISC #AppleSecurity #vulnerabilities
🟡 GM faces $12.75M settlement over violating CCPA, exposing drivers' data via California Attorney General. via BleepingComputer #DataBreach

🔴 A supply chain attack compromises TanStack, UiPath, Mistral AI, and more due to modified npm packages. Affected packages include TanStack, UiPath, Mistral AI, OpenSearch, and Guardrails AI. via The Hacker News #supplychainattack

🟠 A critical vulnerability has been identified in SAP S/4HANA and Commerce products. Attackers can inject malicious code through the flaw. This could lead to information disclosure and code execution.
 • SAP has released patches to fix the issues.
 • The vulnerabilities could impact users who have not applied the latest updates.
 via SecurityWeek #cybersecurity #SAP #SAPvulnerability

🟠 New Android Banking Trojan Alert! TrickMo variant spotted using TON C2 and SOCKS5 to create network pivots targeting banking and crypto wallet users in France, Italy, and Austria. The threat spreads via runtime-loaded APKs. via The Hacker News #cybersecurity #TrickMo

🔴 A critical vulnerability was discovered in Hugging Face AI models, where a single file tweak can hijack model outputs and exfiltrate data.

The Breakdown: A tokenizer library file in the models can be manipulated.

The Technical Vector: This can be done with a simple file tweak.

The Impact: Attackers can exfiltrate data via manipulated model outputs.
via Dark Reading
#cybersecurity #adversarialMachineLearning #HuggingFace

🔴 Microsoft's latest security update patches 137 critical vulnerabilities in Azure, Windows, Dynamics 365, and the SSO Plugin for Jira & Confluence. The fixes address remote code execution (RCE) and denial of service (DoS) flaws. via SecurityWeek #cybersecurity #Microsoft

🔴 UK water supplier fined $1.3 million after personal data of 663,887 customers and employees exposed in breach.

The Breakdown: South Staffordshire Water Plc and its parent company were fined by the Information Commissioner's Office for a data breach.

The Technical Vector: The incident does not provide details on the exploitation method but exposed customer data.

The Impact: Customers and employees of the water supplier were affected, with sensitive information potentially compromised. via BleepingComputer. #cybersecurity #waterutilitybreach #UKdatabreach

🔴 Critical: ShinyHunters cyberattacks target Instructure's Canvas platform. Threat actors stole student data and disrupted schools during final exams. The U.S. House Committee on Homeland Security has called for Instructure executives to testify.
   The Breakdown: Two cyberattacks were carried out on Canvas, allowing ShinyHunters to steal sensitive data and disrupt educational institutions.
   The Technical Vector: The exact exploitation method is unknown, but the attacks were successful in compromising the Canvas platform.
   The Impact: Student data and educational institutions were put at risk,
   via BleepingComputer. #cybersecurity #ShinyHunters #Instructure #Canvas

🟡 ICS Patch Tuesday Review: Siemens, Schneider, and CISA release new security advisories. Vulnerabilities left unpatched by multiple vendors put users at risk. via SecurityWeek #cybersecurity #ICS #industrial_control

🔴 Critical: Researchers warn of a new campaign, GemStuffer, using 150+ RubyGems to exfiltrate data from UK council portals. No malware is involved. Developers with low or no download activity are most at risk. via The Hacker News #cybersecurity #RubyGems #GemStuffer

🟠 Data breach alert! 716,000 users impacted in January cyberattack on OpenLoop Health. Hacker stole personal info from the telehealth platform's systems. 
   The Breakdown: Hack occurred in January, leading to personal data exfiltration. 
   The Technical Vector: Exact attack vector not specified. 
   The Impact: Over 716,000 users at risk, with their personal info compromised. via SecurityWeek #cybersecurity #telehealth #data breach

🟢 LOW

    OpenAI's Daybreak faces off against Anthropic's Mythos model in the AI arms race for cybersecurity.

    The main difference: Daybreak is more open and gated. Mythos, on the other hand, has strict restrictions.

    • Daybreak: more accessible but still secure.

    • Mythos: tightly restricted, more exclusive.

    via CyberScoop

    #cybersecurity #AIarmsrace #OpenAI

🔴 FOXCONN CONFIRMED CYBERATTACK
 
A Nitrogen ransomware group claims to have hacked Foxconn's North American factories, stealing 8TB of data, including confidential documents. 
The attackers demand $35M in Bitcoin to restore access.
• The attack was allegedly carried out using the Nitrogen ransomware.
• The compromised data includes employee and customer information.
• Foxconn has yet to comment on the potential impact of this breach.
 via SecurityWeek
 #cybersecurity #ransomware #Nitrogen

🔴 Critical
DOJ Releases Nationwide Voter Data Collection Memo

The US Department of Justice (DOJ) has released a legal memo justifying the collection of nationwide voter data, sparking controversy among election officials.

The Breakdown:
• The memo outlines the executive branch's role in vetting voter eligibility, potentially allowing for data collection across the country.

The Technical Vector:
The memo suggests a top-down approach to verifying voter eligibility, which some argue could lead to widespread data collection.

The Impact:
• Many election officials are concerned about the potential for mass voter data collection, as it could compromise sensitive information.
via CyberScoop
#cybersecurity #ElectionSecurity #DOJ

🔴 Critical Alert: West Pharmaceutical Services hacked via cyberattack, resulting in data exfiltration and system encryption. The Breakdown: Hackers stole data and encrypted systems. The Technical Vector: Undisclosed attack vector used to breach WestPharma. The Impact: All who rely on WestPharma data and services are at risk. via BleepingComputer #cybersecurity #ransomware #healthcare

⚠️ BREAKING: Researchers say AI has broken every benchmark for autonomous cyber capability. Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview and OpenAI's GPT-5.5 have outpaced every trend line. Is this a one-time leap or the new normal? via CyberScoop #cybersecurity #AIsecurity #machinelearning
🔴 Outlook Junk folder vulnerability - A bypass of the link preview function allows visible URLs, which could enable malicious messages to evade detection via #cybersecurity #Outlook #Phishing
